series_metadata.series_title: ABSTRACT OF REAL & PUBLIC UTILITY PROPERTY, dte 4259
series_metadata.series_description: Summaries of values of all real and public utility personal property taxed in Ohio''s 88 counties, filed annually with the Ohio Department of Taxation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: This abstract to be maintained for 10 years with the Ohio Department of Taxation. After 10 years the abstract is to be sent to the Ohio Historical Society with the Department of Taxation maintaining ownership permanently., Paper: Archives
